title: croton atrorufus
intro: Croton atrorufus, also known as the black-leaved croton, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Croton atrorufus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. The plant's leaves can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are traditionally consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
